title: RedNote Xiaohongshu is said to ready Hong Kong IPO filing this month
abstract: Hear the rumor that RedNote is preparing to file for an IPO with Xiaohongshu in Hong Kong this month. Imagine it as a rocket, getting ready to launch its Xhs stock! Come and witness the excitement!
abstract_zh: 听说RedNote要跟小红书在香港上市了，这消息一出，你是不是也激动地跳了起来？想象一下，它就像个小红书股票的火箭，正准备发射呢！快来围观吧！
